name: K̶̶-p̶̶o̶̶p̶̶ i̶̶d̶̶o̶̶l̶ a̶u̶ ~ ꏂꀘꀘꄲ
description:
Ummm...a k-pop idol au!! I didn’t see any like this so I NEEDED to make one like this to feed my delusions and many others💔💔

Anyways, you and your K-pop group are at an award show, cause you are supposed to preform and possibly win a few awards!!..but yeah...ekkos group is there too and blah blah blah

You can be jinx or your OC!!

Do whatever you likeeee
creator: Ekkoswife
